final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 mirrorless camera showing all its components with labeled part names.

Style/medium: precise technical exploded-view illustration, clean engineering diagram aesthetic with clear part separation and leader lines
Composition: centered exploded isometric or axonometric layout, all components radiating outward from the camera body with connecting lines to labels, generous white space between parts for readability
Subject: Sony A7 mirrorless camera fully disassembled into all major and minor components, including: camera body shell (front and rear), sensor unit (full-frame CMOS), shutter mechanism, mirror box area, lens mount (E-mount), viewfinder/EVF unit, LCD screen, main circuit board/PCB, battery compartment, battery (NP-FW50), SD card slot, hot shoe, mode dial, shutter button, control wheel, joystick, grip rubber, top plate, bottom plate, port covers (USB, HDMI, microphone, headphone), strap lugs, tripod mount, buttons (AF/MF, AEL, custom buttons), diopter adjustment dial, eyecup, flash sync terminal cover
Scene/backdrop: clean white or very light neutral background, no environmental context
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: neutral technical palette — light grey body parts, subtle color coding to differentiate component categories (mechanical, electronic, optical), black label text on white
Materials/textures: flat vector-style surfaces with minimal shading to preserve diagram clarity
Text (verbatim): Sony A7 — all part names labeled in English (e.g., "Full-Frame CMOS Sensor", "E-Mount", "Electronic Viewfinder", "Shutter Button", "Mode Dial", "Main PCB", "Battery NP-FW50", "SD Card Slot", "LCD Monitor", "Hot Shoe", "Tripod Socket", etc.)
Constraints: all labeled part names must be legible; leader lines must clearly connect each label to its corresponding component; layout must be organized and not overlapping
Avoid: decorative artistic flourishes, photorealistic rendering that obscures part boundaries, unlabeled components, cluttered overlapping text
